title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Bajaj Electricals - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!
